shooters 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference

Launch a demo Shiny app

run_demo.Rd

Launches one of the example Shiny applications bundled with shooters in inst/apps/. Each app demonstrates a different structural pattern for use with ns_tree():

Usage

run_demo(which = c("nested_modules", "single_module", "no_modules", "minimal"))

Arguments

which

Character scalar; which demo app to launch. One of "minimal", "no_modules", "single_module", or "nested_modules" (default).

Value

Called for its side effect (launches a Shiny app). Returns invisibly.

Details

  • "minimal" — bare ui / server objects passed directly to shinyApp(), no wrapper functions and no modules.

  • "no_modules" — helper functions wrapping ui and server, no Shiny modules.

  • "single_module" — one module pair (NS + moduleServer).

  • "nested_modules" — modules that call other modules, spread across multiple files.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
run_demo()                   # nested_modules (default)
run_demo("single_module")
run_demo("no_modules")
run_demo("minimal")
} # }
